title: ValidationVerdict
description: Adversarial review verdict for a single finding. CANNOT emit new findings.

rationale.description: Why the finding stands or falls. Must engage with the evidence, not restate it.

alternative_explanation.description: If rejected: the benign explanation. If confirmed: any rival hypothesis you ruled out.

missing_preconditions.description: Conditions that must hold for the bug to fire (sanitization upstream, config flags, etc.).

suggested_test.description: Concrete test that would disambiguate — e.g. a curl command, a unit test stub.
